settings.text:
Welcome to the Terea Heets Hub Dubai Help Center. This page explains how to place an order, track support requests, and contact our team for assistance.

Ordering support
You can place an order directly through our online store. Please review product details, quantities, delivery information, and contact details before checkout. If you need to change or cancel an order, contact us as soon as possible. We can only update an order before it has been prepared or dispatched.

Product availability
All products are subject to availability. If an item becomes unavailable after you place an order, we will contact you with replacement, backorder, or cancellation options.

Delivery support
We offer delivery across supported service areas including Dubai, Sharjah, and Ajman. Delivery time estimates may vary based on location, traffic, weather, stock availability, and order volume.

Shipping options
Standard Delivery: AED 25. Free for orders AED 400.00 and up.
Express Delivery: AED 30. Free for orders AED 400.00 and up. Estimated delivery time is 1-2 business days.
Free Delivery: Available for orders AED 400.00 and up.

Payment support
Available payment methods are shown at checkout. If a payment fails, please check your payment details or contact your bank/payment provider. Orders are confirmed only after payment or order verification is completed.

Age-restricted products
Some products may be age-restricted. By ordering, you confirm that you meet the legal age requirement in your location. We may request verification or refuse service where required.

Contact our team
For the fastest support, include your order number, full name, phone number, and a clear description of the issue.

Phone/WhatsApp: +971 544 777 918
Email: Tereaheetshub@gmail.com
Address: Marasi Drive, Business Bay

Support requests are reviewed in the order they are received. Response times may vary during peak hours and promotional periods.
